# CortIQ — Full Product Documentation

## What is CortIQ?

CortIQ is a web analytics platform designed for the Agentic Web — the emerging era where AI agents (ChatGPT Browser, Perplexity Comet, Claude Browser) constitute a growing share of web traffic.

CortIQ is the first analytics platform with a dedicated module for tracking and analyzing AI agent behavior on websites. Beyond AI tracking, it provides a comprehensive analytics stack: cookie-free server-side tracking, click heatmaps, session recording, A/B testing, form analytics, geolocation maps, and a GDPR-compliant consent management platform (CMP).

**Production URL:** https://cortiq.se
**Company:** Expandtalk Corporation AB Sweden
**Status:** Invite-only beta

---

## Core Features

### Agentic Browser Analytics (World First)

Detects and analyzes AI agents that browse websites autonomously:

- **Supported agents:** ChatGPT Browser, Perplexity Comet, Claude Browser, Bing AI, and generic AI crawlers
- **Detection method:** User-agent parsing + behavioral fingerprinting (visual/headless/text-based browser type)
- **Journey funnel:** Full session path reconstruction for AI agents
- **Conversion attribution:** Measures conversions triggered by AI-driven traffic
- **Citation tracking:** Detects LLM citation requests and training crawlers separately from browsing agents
- **Dashboard tabs:** "AI Traffic" and "AI Agents" in the main analytics dashboard

### Cookie-Free Analytics

Server-side tracking without any client-side cookies or personal data collection:

- 100% GDPR-compliant
- PTS-approved (Swedish Post and Telecom Authority)
- No cookie banners required for this tracking mode
- GA4 server-side integration for paid ads attribution
- Parallel to standard first-party cookie tracking (hybrid mode available)

### Click Heatmaps

- Click position recording with device segmentation (desktop / tablet / mobile)
- Per-page heatmap selection
- Mobile-specific insights view
- Rendered as canvas overlays on page screenshots

### Session Recording

- Full session replay using rrweb
- AI agent vs human session filter
- Device and URL filters
- Visitor hash search (GDPR-safe, no PII)

### A/B Testing

- Two-variant (A/B) test management
- Statistical significance calculations built-in
- Conversion goal assignment per test

### Form Analytics

- Field-level funnel visualization
- Drop-off detection per form field
- Supports contact forms, checkout forms, lead forms

### GDPR & CMP

- Cookie consent management with nudging technology
- Higher opt-in rates through smart banner timing and UX
- Configurable data retention (default 730 days)
- TCF v2 compatible

### Advanced Features

- **Geolocation Maps:** Leaflet.js world map with visitor clusters; drill-down from country to city
- **Data Warehouse Connectors:** Sync to BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Databricks
- **User LTV & Cohort Analysis:** Lifetime value tracking with cohort grouping by first visit month
- **Tag Manager:** Create event, pixel, script, and HTML tags without code deployment
- **Web Vitals:** LCP, FID/INP, CLS tracking with historical trends
- **White Label:** Custom branding and colors for agency resellers
- **SAML SSO:** Enterprise single sign-on

---

## Technical Architecture

### Frontend
- React 18, TypeScript, Vite
- shadcn-ui (Radix UI), Tailwind CSS
- Recharts for data visualization

### Backend
- Supabase (PostgreSQL + Deno Edge Functions)
- 62 database tables, 51 edge functions
- Row-level security (RLS) for multi-tenant data isolation

### Tracking Script

Installed on customer websites via a single `<script>` tag:

```html
<script src="https://cortiq.se/spa-tracking.js" data-site-id="YOUR_SITE_ID" defer></script>
```

The script handles: heatmap recording, session events, AI agent detection, UTM parameter capture, GDPR consent integration (CortIQ banner, Cookiebot, TCF v2).

### API

REST API documented at https://cortiq.se/api (OpenAPI/Swagger). Supports:
- Event ingestion (`/track-event`)
- Heatmap data retrieval
- Analytics queries
- AI agent session data

---

## What CortIQ Does NOT Include

- Scroll heatmaps (click heatmaps only)
- Attention maps
- Multivariate testing (A/B only, two variants)
- Visual editor for A/B tests
- Mobile app

---

## Target Users

- European SMEs with GDPR compliance requirements
- WordPress publishers (dedicated plugin in development)
- Digital agencies managing analytics for multiple clients
- Organizations with significant or growing AI-agent traffic

---

## Competitive Position

CortIQ is the only analytics platform with dedicated AI-agent tracking as a first-class feature. Traditional analytics platforms (Google Analytics, Plausible, Fathom, Matomo) treat AI agents as regular bot traffic and filter them out. CortIQ treats them as a distinct traffic category with their own funnel, attribution, and behavior analysis.

The combination of AI-agent analytics + cookie-free server-side tracking + GDPR-native CMP is unique in the European market.

---

*Last updated: 2026-05-27*
